description: This jewellery set includes a peacock-shaped pendant with matching earrings, designed for ethnic wear. The gold-plated finish adds a traditional look suitable for daily use and special occasions. Its lightweight feel allows comfortable wear for long hours. This set is designed for women who have a preference for simple traditional jewellery. The set pairs well with common ethnic outfits and keeps a neat, graceful look.

Featuring a peacock design, this pendant is decorated with american diamonds and cubic zirconia. The studded pattern adds detail without making the piece appear heavy. A glossy finish improves the overall look. The pendant sits neatly along the neckline when worn with the chain. The design keeps a traditional and balanced look while adding charm to the neckline.

Earrings are designed to pair with the pendant for a coordinated look. Push-plug fastening keeps them in place while worn. Their medium size gives a comfortable fit on the earlobe. Suitable for daily wear and festive occasions. The design goes well with ethnic outfits without heaviness.

Made with an alloy base and finished with gold plating for decorative use. A non-corrosive base allows regular wear. The smooth surface helps keep the finish over time. Lightweight material makes the set easy to handle. Designed mainly for visual appeal while staying comfortable to wear for long hours.

Ideal for daily wear, celebrations, religious occasions, weddings, and workwear. The set comes with a pendant and chain, plus a matching pair of earrings. Part of an ethnic jewellery collection, it showcases traditional design. It works well as a gift or for personal use. Easily fits into regular jewellery rotation daily.

This wall-mounted kitchen rack helps organise everyday cooking tools neatly. Commonly used items stay easy to see and access. Designed for regular kitchen use and supports smoother cooking tasks. Keeps the area organised without taking up extra space. Items can be placed and removed easily during daily cooking routines.

Made from durable ABS plastic suits common kitchen conditions. Performs well in damp kitchen conditions. Suitable for use around sinks and cooking areas. Easy-to-wipe surface helps with cleaning. Keeps the kitchen clean and organised. Lightweight design makes it easy to handle during installation or repositioning.

Designed to be fixed on the wall to free up counter space. Keeps work surfaces clear while cooking. Useful in kitchens with limited storage areas. Makes better use of unused wall sections. Facilitates neat placement without extra shelves. Helps keep essential utensils within easy reach during daily cooking.

Equipped with hooks and holders for spoons, ladles, knives, and other kitchen tools. Serves everyday utensil storage needs. Designed to hold multiple items at the same time. Keeps utensils organised and easy to reach. Helps maintain cleanliness while cooking.

This rack is easy to install and clean, and a low-maintenance design suits everyday kitchen routines. A matte finish gives a neat and simple appearance suitable for long-term regular use. Designed for practical household needs, its compact design helps save space while keeping utensils organised.

This art silk saree features delicate machine embroidery with sequined borders. Soft striped patterns add charm while keeping a traditional and refined look. Light sparkle highlights the saree’s elegant appeal. Suitable for festive wear and pairs well with simple accessories for a sophisticated style.

Designed for weddings and festive events, this saree works well for different kinds of gatherings. Light fabric keeps you comfortable for long hours of wear. Its versatile design matches both modern and traditional jewellery for day or evening events. It gives a balanced and elegant look for special occasions.

Made from soft, breathable art silk, this saree feels gentle on the skin. Its smooth texture enhances draping and allows comfortable movement all day. Fabric retains a neat and elegant look even after long wear. Suitable for multiple festive wears without any discomfort.

It comes with a matching unstitched blouse piece, allowing the blouse to be designed as desired. The unstitched blouse piece lets the style and fit be adjusted for comfort and a flattering look. This set provides everything needed for a complete, coordinated outfit.

The saree should be dry cleaned to maintain the fabric and embroidery. It is light and easy to carry, store, or handle. Its size and weight make it simple to pack for travel or keep safely for future use. The fabric keeps its shine and shape with care.

This men’s dhoti is designed for traditional Indian style. Suitable for pooja, temple rituals, and festive occasions. The light fabric keeps you comfortable for long hours. Wear it with a kurta or angavastram for a full, simple ethnic look.

Made from a smooth silk-blend fabric, this dhoti feels soft and breathable. The fabric drapes naturally for a neat, polished look. Its rich texture adds subtle elegance to traditional attire. Suitable for everyday festive wear and rituals.

This dhoti has a subtle self-design that adds simple charm to your ethnic collection. Borders give a festive touch without overpowering the look. Versatile enough for temple visits and social celebrations. Complements various traditional outfits with ease.

The unstitched dhoti includes a matching stole, allowing a personalised fit. It can be styled in different ways based on the occasion or preference. Suitable for men who value comfort and flexibility in traditional clothing. The ready format makes dressing simple while offering a regal and polished appearance.

This dhoti can be washed easily by hand or in a machine. It retains its softness and design even after repeated use. Lightweight and breathable, making it suitable for long hours during ceremonies or festive gatherings. A practical yet stylish addition to your ethnic collection.

This wall decor set adds a personal touch through a simple and tasteful design. The playing card symbols create a recognisable theme linked to leisure and indoor recreational settings. It adds a subtle accent to the surrounding space without overshadowing existing decor, making it suitable for everyday rooms where visual interest is preferred without complicating daily use.

Each piece displays a different playing card symbol that feels familiar and visually balanced. Together, these symbols build a clear wall theme while still leaving enough open space for the room to feel neat and organised. It is an ideal choice for people who like themed decor but prefer designs that remain subtle and uncluttered for daily living use.

The use of MDF wood gives wall decor a smooth, even surface suited for indoor spaces. This material is often selected for decorative items that need to stay secure on walls during regular household use. It helps the decor sit flat and keep a neat appearance, which is useful in spaces where presentation is important.

Lightweight design supports simple wall placement without putting excess load on mounting points. Individual pieces can be positioned, spaced, or rearranged based on wall size and layout preferences. Adjustment remains convenient when updating room arrangements or refreshing decor themes. The format allows flexibility in placement while maintaining a neat and orderly wall presentation during regular indoor use.

Designed for use in living rooms, offices, cafes, and gaming areas. The card theme suits both personal and shared spaces. Also, works well as a decor choice for themed interiors. It pairs well with modern styling without overpowering the space. Suitable for regular indoor decorative use.

These incense sticks are suitable for regular use in homes and other spaces. It fits into daily routines such as morning prayers and quiet evenings. The incense sticks are easy to use and work well for routine use. They help maintain a familiar indoor environment without affecting usual habits or daily activities.

Suitable for people who prefer traditional scents often used during prayer, meditation, or cultural routines, these incense sticks can be used in living rooms, prayer areas, or other spaces where focus is needed. They help keep the indoor space lightly scented, making them appropriate for everyday spiritual or quiet moments during regular use.

Offering a fusion and modern feel, the fragrance suits different moods throughout the day. It can be used during work at home, reading, relaxed evenings, or social visits. The light scent settles gently into both modern and familiar spaces, remaining unobtrusive while supporting regular routines.

Combining traditional and modern elements in a balanced way, the fragrance works well during working hours at home, reading time, or relaxed evenings. It also fits regular family time and social visits without feeling out of place. The light scent spreads evenly across indoor spaces, making it comfortable for repeated use.
